resources.name: lmmarketcap-list-models
resources.title: List LM Market Cap models
resources.description: Returns paginated list of AI models with optional filters like category, provider, status, search and sorting.

resources.name: lmmarketcap-list-categories
resources.title: List LM Market Cap categories
resources.description: Returns the full hierarchical category tree used to classify AI models.

resources.name: lmmarketcap-health
resources.title: LM Market Cap API health
resources.description: Returns operational status of the LM Market Cap API.

resources.name: lmmarketcap-health-pipelines
resources.title: LM Market Cap pipeline health
resources.description: Returns ingestion pipeline health and data freshness status.
